metadata.significance: Contrasts night and day, emphasizes charity and piety leading to different paths

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ

translations.en_sahih: By the night when it covers
translations.en_yusufali: By the Night as it conceals (the light);
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi malam apabila ia menyelubungi segala-galanya (dengan gelap-gelitanya),

translations.en_sahih: And [by] the day when it appears
translations.en_yusufali: By the Day as it appears in glory;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan siang apabila ia lahir terang-benderang;

translations.en_sahih: And [by] He who created the male and female,
translations.en_yusufali: By (the mystery of) the creation of male and female;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi Yang menciptakan (makhluk-makhlukNya) lelaki dan perempuan, (jantan dan betina); -

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, your efforts are diverse.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, (the ends) ye strive for are diverse.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya amal usaha kamu adalah berbagai-bagai keadaannya.

translations.en_sahih: As for he who gives and fears Allah
translations.en_yusufali: So he who gives (in charity) and fears (Allah),
translations.ms_basmeih: Jelasnya: adapun orang yang memberikan apa yang ada padanya ke jalan kebaikan dan bertaqwa (mengerjakan suruhan Allah dan meninggalkan segala laranganNya), -

translations.en_sahih: And believes in the best [reward],
translations.en_yusufali: And (in all sincerity) testifies to the best,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta ia mengakui dengan yakin akan perkara yang baik,

translations.en_sahih: We will ease him toward ease.
translations.en_yusufali: We will indeed make smooth for him the path to Bliss.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesungguhnya Kami akan memberikannya kemudahan untuk mendapat kesenangan (Syurga).

translations.en_sahih: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need
translations.en_yusufali: But he who is a greedy miser and thinks himself self-sufficient,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebaliknya: orang yang bakhil (daripada berbuat kebajikan) dan merasa cukup dengan kekayaan dan kemewahannya, -

translations.en_sahih: And denies the best [reward],
translations.en_yusufali: And gives the lie to the best,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta ia mendustakan perkara yang baik,

translations.en_sahih: We will ease him toward difficulty.
translations.en_yusufali: We will indeed make smooth for him the path to Misery;
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesungguhnya Kami akan memberikannya kemudahan untuk mendapat kesusahan dan kesengsaraan;

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama yughnee AAanhu maluhu itha taradda

translations.en_sahih: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?
translations.en_yusufali: Nor will his wealth profit him when he falls headlong (into the Pit).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apakah pertolongan yang dapat diberi kepadanya oleh hartanya apabiha ia telah terjerumus (ke dalam azab seksa hari akhirat)?

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily We take upon Ourselves to guide,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya tanggungan Kamilah memberi hidayah petunjuk (tentang yang benar dan yang salah).

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
translations.en_yusufali: And verily unto Us (belong) the End and the Beginning.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kamilah yang menguasai hari akhirat dan alam dunia.

translations.en_sahih: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing.
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore do I warn you of a Fire blazing fiercely;
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (serentak dengan memberi hidayah petunjuk) Aku juga telah memberi amaran mengingatkan kamu akan api neraka yang marak menjulang,

translations.en_sahih: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one.
translations.en_yusufali: None shall reach it but those most unfortunate ones
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang tidak akan menderita bakarannya melainkan orang yang sungguh celaka, -

translations.en_sahih: Who had denied and turned away.
translations.en_yusufali: Who give the lie to Truth and turn their backs.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang telah mendustakan (kebenaran) dan berpaling ingkar.

translations.en_sahih: But the righteous one will avoid it -
translations.en_yusufali: But those most devoted to Allah shall be removed far from it,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebaliknya) akan dijauhkan (azab neraka) itu daripada orang yang sungguh bertaqwa, -

translations.en_sahih: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself
translations.en_yusufali: Those who spend their wealth for increase in self-purification,
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang mendermakan hartanya dengan tujuan membersihkan dirinya dan hartabendanya,

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعْمَةٍ تُجْزَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama liahadin AAindahu min niAAmatin tujza

translations.en_sahih: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded
translations.en_yusufali: And have in their minds no favour from anyone for which a reward is expected in return,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang ia tidak menanggung budi sesiapapun, yang patut di balas,

translations.en_sahih: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High.
translations.en_yusufali: But only the desire to seek for the Countenance of their Lord Most High;
translations.ms_basmeih: Hanyalah mengharapkan keredaan Tuhannya Yang Maha Tinggi;

translations.en_sahih: And he is going to be satisfied.
translations.en_yusufali: And soon will they attain (complete) satisfaction.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, ia tetap akan berpuas hati (pada hari akhirat, dengan mendapat segala yang diharapkannya).
